summary: Reviewed PM's 38 user stories, ProjM's 122-task breakdown (15 epics, 120-160 dev-days), and HR's team composition (14 agents, no new hires). APPROVED with 5 binding directives: (1) split workload between backend-dev and developer agents, (2) enforce P0/P1-first discipline, (3) deduplicate overlapping tasks, (4) lock tech stack before first commit, (5) weekly checkpoint cadence. Logged decision as DEC-004. Advanced phase from planning → development. Development begins immediately on Phase 1 (OSS TypeScript Framework).
